upasargachandrika.example_text: 'uttizWa prehi pradrava' (aTarva॰4.12.6) pradrava=tvarito yAhi palAyasva
'BayArtaH SakraH pradudrAva saraH pravezwum' (BA॰vana॰101.16) pradudrAva pratatvare
'vitrAsitA mfgAH siMhEH sahasA pradrutAH' (rA॰2.97.9) pranazwA ityarTaH
'raRAtpradravanti balAni' (veRI॰4) palAyanta ityarTaH
'raTAH sarve kasmAccEte pravidrutAH' (BA॰droRa॰122.2) vidrutA BagnAH palAyitAH pravidrutA iti parasparaM viSlizya palAyitA ityarTamAcazwe praSabdaH praviSlezaM pArTakyamAha
'parAdravatprARaparIpsururvyAm' (BA॰pu॰1.7.18) parAdravat=palAyata
'parAvfttamapAvfttamapadrutamavaplavam' (rA॰6.40.25) pravaRIkftakAyasya yA vidrutistadapadrutam
'yatrA naraH saM ca vi ca dravanti' (vA॰saM॰29.48) sandravanti=saNgacCante
anvarTaM Kalvapi nirvacanam- 'guRasandrAvo dravyam' (5.1.119 sUtre BAzye ) guRasamUha ityarTaH
'samprAdravadyatra pArTA baBUvuH' (BA0 vana0 421) prADAvadityarTaH
'samudrAtsarve devAH samudBavanti' (Sa0 brA0 14222) vegena samaM nizkrAmanti samBUya palAyanta ityAha
'samudraH kasmAt samuddravantyasmAdApaH' (ni0 210) bAzparUpeRodgacCantItyAha
'(panTAnam) ayomuKESca kAkAdyErgfDrESca samaBidrutam' (BA0 svargA0 220) samaBidrutamAkrAntam
'bahirbilaM nirdravatu' (aTarva0 9811) nirdravatu=nirDAvatu tvaritaM nizkramyApagacCatu
'grIvAste kftye pAdO cApi kartsyAmi nirdrava' (aTarva0 10121) ukto'rTaH
'yasmAdvA prAgudIcIrApo nirdraveyuH' (lO0 gf0 111) aBizyanderan pravaheyuH
'yatrA naraH saM ca vi ca dravanti' (vA0 saM0 2948) vidravanti vigacCanti=palAyante
'te SUrA hataBUyizWA hatASvaraTavAraRAH utsfjya BImakarRO ca sarvato vyadravandiSaH' (BA0).. ukto'rTaH
'vidravanti BayAd BItA nAnAdigByaH sahasraSaH' (rA0 15526)
'ApaScukzuBire cEva cakampe ca vasunDarA vyadravan girayaH' (BA0 anu0 16015).. vyadravan vidIrRatAmagacCan
'arAjake hi loke'sminsarvato vidrute BayAt' (manu0 73) vidrute pracalite
'BayArtA vipradudruvuH' (hari0 211998) palAyAYcakrire
'yUTapA mattAH sayUTA vipradudruvuH' (rA0 2931) ukto'rTaH
'dfzwvA vipradrutA BItA munayaH SataSo diSaH' (rA0 15522) vipradrutAH kAndiSIkAH
'vipradrutAnahaM manye nimagnAYSokasAgare' (BA0 karRa0 219) ukto'rTaH
'yaTA vE vyokasO (pakziRO) vipradravataH' (paYca0 brA0 1438) vipradravataH=viSlizwaM patataH
'tAMSca vipradrutAnsarvAn' (rA0 2965) vipradrutAn dikzu vidikzu ca drutAn palAyitAn
'yatrApaH pratIcIrgAhapatyAd vyavadraveyuH' (kA0 saM0 253) syanderannityarTaH
'taTeti taM (vftraM) hanizyanta Adravan' (E0 brA0 320) Adravo DAvanam
'samAhUtaH kena cidAdraveti' (BA0 vana0 59) Adrava tvaritamAyAhi
'so'venmAM vE hanizyanta Adravanti' (E0 brA0 320) itaH satvaramAyAntItyAha
'tAvAdrutyAbrUtAM prARantu nO yuvAByAM paSava iti' (jE0 brA0 1109) Adrutya etya sahasopetya
'vfzA yozAmaDi dravati' (Sa0 brA0 17212 3857) ArohatItyarTaH
'atidrava sArameyO SvAnO caturakzO SabalO' (f0 101410) atidrava=atikrAma atikramya yAhi
'uttaraM girimatidudrAva' (Sa0 brA0 1815) atidudrAva tvarayA prApa
'samAne vE yonA AstAM sUryaScAgniSca tataH sUrya udadravat' (kA0 saM 63)
'udadravat' (kA0 saM0 66) udadravat UrDvamagamat
'so (agniH)'sya mUrDna UrDva udadravat' (kapi0 ka0 saM0 312) ukto'rTaH
'tenEvodrutyAgnihotraM juhuyAt' (tE0 brA0 2216) uddrutya SIGraM nizkramya
'tAn patnIsaMyAjA ta upAnayan te tadantameva kftvodadravan' (tE0 brA0 1593) udadravan tatparityajyodgatAH
'SrI rvE somaH pApmA suropayAmA yadAgate kAle prAYcaH somEruddravanti' (kAWaka0 146) uddravanti=utkrAmanti
'aTo KalvAhuryat prAca uddrutasya skandet' (jE0 brA0 154) uddrutasya nizkrAntasya
'prANudAdravati' (Sa0 brA0 12447) uduhya udgfhyAgre saratItyarTaH
'sinDo yadvAjA~ aByadravastvam' (f0 10752) aByadravaH=aByaDAvaH
'aByadravanmatsyarAjaM raTavrAtena sarvaSaH' (BA0 vi0 334) ukto'rTaH
'payasyaBidravati BuvaM yugAvaDO saritpatirnahi samupEti riktatAm' (SiSu0 1740) BuvaM payasi jale'BiplavamAne satItyAha
'aBidravatyayaskAntamayo niScetanaM yaTA' (BA0 SAM0 2113) aBidravati aBimuKaM sarati
'makarandena pratihato jAmAtA balAtkAreRABidravan' (mAlatI0 7) aBidravan upadravan Askandan
'gajA ivAnyonyamaBidravantaH' (mfcCa0) ukto'rTaH
'aBidrutamivAraRye siMhena gajayUTapam' (rA0 2836) aBidrutam AkrAntamAskannam
'janmamftyujarAvyADi-vedanABiraBidrutam apAramiva cAsvasTaM saMsAraM tyajataH suKam' (BA0 SAM0 933).. aBidrutamAkrAntaM parItamupahatam
'aparedyurudyati dyumaRAvuddAmadyutAvaBidrutatArake' (harza0 u0 1) aBidrutAstArakA nyakkftAstArAH
'aBidravaRamAplAvamavasTAnaM savigraham' (rA0 64025) aBidravaRaM yudDamArgaviSezaH BArate SalyaparvaRi 5719 ityatrApi gadAyudDANgatvenopanyastam vegenAByAgamanamarTaH
'hayErapi hayArohAScAmarApIqaDAriBiH anyonyamaBividrutAH--' (BA0 BIzma0 4620) aBividrutA=vegenAByaDAvan
'tataH SAntanavo BIzmaH sEnyaM dfzwvABividrutam' (BA0 BIzma0 10131) itastataH palAyamAnam kAndiSIkamityarTaH
'tamindro'ByAdudrAva hanizyan' (Sa0 brA0 16316) aBimuKIBUyADAvadityarTaH
'dravantvasya haraya upa naH' (f0 4161) upadravantu upayantu
'svAngacCatu te mano aDA pitf~ rupa drava' (aTarva 18223) upadrava=upehi
'upadrava payasA goDugozam' (aTarva0 7736) ukto'rTaH
'paSUn yajamAnasyopa dodrAva' (tE0 saM0 151) upadodrAva upAdravat upAplavata AkrAmat jiGAMsayA'Byatvarata
'tato vegena mahatA dAnavA mAmupAdravan' (BA0 vana0 16921) upAdravan aByayuH
'tamupAdravad udyamya dakziRaM dorniSAcaraH' (raGu0 1523)
'mihaM basAna upa hImadudrot' (indraH) (f0 2303) ukto'rTaH
'avijYAnAcca mUQAtmA punaH punarupAdravat' (BA0 SAM0 30948) kleSavAnaBUdityarTaH iha dravatirakarmakaH prayuktaH
'savrIhIRAM yAvadapAsituM gatAH SukAn mfgEstAvadupadrutaSriyAm' (SiSu0 1242) upadrutaSriyAM vihatasampadAm (vrIhimatAM kedArasamUhAnAm) gatA gopikA;
'SaraRAgataSca kzuDArtaSca SatruBiScApyupadrUtaH' (hari0 1151) upadrutaH pIqitaH kadarTitaH viprakftaH
'puMsAmasamarTAnAmupadravAyAtmano BavetkopaH' (paYcata0 1368) upadravo'svAsTyam AbADaH
'mA BUtte mannimittamupadravaH' (kaTA0 1782) upadrava upaplavo viGno duHKaM kleSaH saMNkawam anizwam
'akftopa dravaH kaScinmahAnapi na pUjyate pUjayanti narA nAgAn na tArkzyaM nAgaGAtinam' (paYcata0 1474).. ukto'rTaH
'vimale ca prakASete viSAKe nirupadrave' (rA0 6450) nIhArAdiH kAntiviGAtaka upadravaH tadrahite ityarTaH
'annasyopadravaM paSya mfto hi kimaSizyati' (rA0 210814) SrAdDanindAyAM vacanam upadravo nASaH durupayogaH vyarTa upayogaH
'pUrvodBavanimittena yo'paro jAyate gadaH tamupadravamityAhuratIsAro yaTA jvare' (kA0 saM0 sUtra0 2758).. nigadavyAKyAtam
'tatrOpasargiko yaH pUrvotpannaM vyADiM jaGanyakAlajo vyADirupasfjati sa tanmUla evopadravasaMjYaH' (suSruta0 112710)
'upadraveRa juzwastu vraRaH kfcCreRa siDyati' (saSruta0 239910)
'avipAko'ruciSCardinidrA kAsaH sapInasaH upadravAH prajAyante mehAnAM kAsajanmanAm' (vAgBawa0 ni0 a0 10)..
'anfgyajurasAmA ca prAjApatya upadravaH' (BA0 SAM0 6044) upadravati samIpaM gacCatItyupadravo dAsaH SUdraH
'A mA pUzannupa drava SaMsizaM nu te' (f0 64816) mAmupAdrava mAmprati tvarasva
